generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller interfacing with the vehicle's motor to execute desired speed commands from the Digital Twin Entity via the Actuation Functional Entity. Implements real-time control signals for the Physical Twin's speed regulation."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Servo mechanism integrated into the lower-level chassis responsible for directional control, receiving steering adjustment commands from the Digital Twin Entity's Actuation Functional Entity."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution 3D LiDAR sensor capturing point clouds of the vehicle's environment for object detection and tracking. Operates via ROS2 topics to transmit raw sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera providing supplementary visual data including object size, position, and velocity estimation. Transmits raw frames via ROS2 topics to the Physical Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraVisualData
]

instance EgoVehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor suite measuring ego vehicle state parameters including speed and steering angle. Transmits real-time state data via ROS2 topics to the Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraVisualData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleStateSensor
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ActuationCommandsData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DigitalTwinEntity
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise (DBSCAN) algorithm implemented for object detection and segmentation from LiDAR point clouds. Inputs raw point cloud data and outputs clustered object regions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterStateEstimationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman Filter-based state estimation model for tracking detected objects' position, velocity, and acceleration. Processes clustered object data to generate accurate motion trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ISO15622CompliantACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) control logic implementing Performance Class I standards. Handles lead vehicle detection, longitudinal control, and speed adjustment algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unprocessed 3D point cloud data captured by Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, transmitted via ROS2 topics. Contains raw environmental scans used for object detection."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel
]

instance DepthCameraFramesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw visual frames from Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera containing RGB-D data for object size and position estimation. Transmitted via ROS2 topics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraVisualData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data including speed (m/s) and steering angle (degrees) measured by onboard sensors. Used for ACC system calibration and path planning."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object track data (size, position, velocity) derived from point cloud processing, stored in SQL database for historical analysis and reporting."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracksData
]

instance VehicleStateTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series dataset of ego vehicle state parameters (speed, steering angle) stored in SQL database for post-processing and performance analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based functional entity implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for point cloud processing. Runs on Jetson Orin Nano for real-time object detection and tracking."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic. Offloads computations from Physical Twin to Digital Twin Entity to reduce Jetson Orin Nano load."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveCruiseControlService
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node responsible for aggregating sensor data streams (LiDAR, depth camera, ego state) and forwarding processed data to Digital Twin Entity via Wi-Fi."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database-backed service generating human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state time-series data for post-processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance PresentationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization library (ROS2-compatible) rendering object tracks, vehicle state, and driving path in real-time for user interface."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ActuationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package translating Digital Twin control commands into physical actuation signals for speed and steering. Interfaces with Vedder ESC and steering servo."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2) providing inter-node communication, node lifecycle management, and hardware abstraction across Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingEnabler, ACCControlEnabler, DataCollectionEnabler, ReportingEnabler, PresentationEnabler, ActuationEnabler
]

instance JetsonOrinNanoPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano running Jetpack 5.0 SDK for onboard computing in Physical Twin Entity. Hosts ROS2 nodes for point cloud processing and actuation."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingEnabler, ActuationEnabler
]

instance CloudEdgePlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge server infrastructure hosting Digital Twin Entity components (ACC control, reporting) to offload computation from Jetson Orin Nano."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlEnabler, ReportingEnabler
]

// C6: Services
instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time object detection and tracking service using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering on LiDAR point clouds. Provides processed object tracks for ACC system."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectDetectionInsight, ObjectTrackingInsight
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC system handling lead vehicle detection, longitudinal control, and speed adjustment. Offloaded from Physical Twin to reduce computational load."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service displaying ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D visualization UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state time-series data stored in SQL database for post-processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceReportInsight, MaintenanceReportInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Geographically remote control service enabling enable/disable ACC, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ObjectDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of objects in proximity to the vehicle using DBSCAN clustering on LiDAR point clouds, providing spatial awareness for ACC system."
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Kalman Filter-based tracking of detected objects' position, velocity, and acceleration trajectories for ACC decision-making."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D-rendered visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and driving path for operator monitoring and decision support."
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time monitoring of ego vehicle state parameters and environmental objects via the Digital Twin's visualization interface."
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic longitudinal control of the vehicle based on lead vehicle detection and ISO 15622-compliant ACC logic."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of vehicle speed to maintain safe following distance from lead vehicle or user-specified desired speed."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC functionality and desired speed adjustment via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate emergency braking command sent to Physical Twin in critical situations detected by the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical performance analysis report of fuel economy and driving efficiency derived from vehicle state time-series data."
]

instance MaintenanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance report identifying potential brake system failures or motor degradation through state estimation analysis."
]

// C1: Entities
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Physical [
    base:desc "Primary entity hosting resource-specific functionality including point cloud clustering, tracking, and actuation. Runs on Jetson Orin Nano hardware."
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, EgoVehicleStateSensor,
                 VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator,
                 PointCloudProcessingEnabler, ActuationEnabler,
                 JetsonOrinNanoPlatform
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Digital [
    base:desc "Central entity containing ACC controlling, data collection, reporting, and presentation functionalities. Deployed on cloud/edge infrastructure."
    base:contains ACCControlEnabler, DataCollectionEnabler, ReportingEnabler,
                 PresentationEnabler, ROS2Middleware, CloudEdgePlatform
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:User [
    base:desc "User interface entity comprising 3D visualization and control panel sub-components for operator interaction with the Digital Twin system."
    base:contains PresentationEnabler
]

// C18: Entity Relationships
instance CommunicationLink : DTDFVocab:Communication [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi-based communication link between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity for data transmission and control command exchange."
    DTDFVocab:connects PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance UserDigitalTwinInteraction : DTDFVocab:Interaction [
    base:desc "Human-machine interface enabling operators to interact with Digital Twin Entity via 3D visualization and control panel."
    DTDFVocab:connects UserEntity, DigitalTwinEntity
]

// C19: Entity Deployment
instance PhysicalTwinDeployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical deployment of Physical Twin Entity on 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle chassis with Jetson Orin Nano onboard computer."
    DTDFVocab:deploys PhysicalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:on JetsonOrinNanoPlatform
]

instance DigitalTwinDeployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge deployment of Digital Twin Entity for offloading computation-intensive ACC control and reporting functionalities."
    DTDFVocab:deploys DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:on CloudEdgePlatform
]

// C20: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Operational environment for the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle including road surfaces, traffic conditions, and environmental obstacles."
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, EgoVehicleStateSensor
]

instance VehicleChassisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Mechanical environment of the vehicle chassis including lower-level steering and speed control components."
    base:contains VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator
]

// C21: Component Hierarchy
instance LowerLevelChassisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium stripped-down chassis responsible for basic vehicle mechanics including steering and speed control."
    base:contains SteeringServoActuator
]

instance UpperLevelAutonomyComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper chassis layer hosting autonomy components including Jetson Orin Nano, sensors, and actuation systems."
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera,
                 EgoVehicleStateSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController,
                 JetsonOrinNanoPlatform
]

// C12: Data Flow Connections
instance DataFlowFromLiDARToProcessing : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:source HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:target PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataFlowFromDepthCameraToProcessing : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:source IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:target PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataFlowFromProcessingToTracks : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:source PointCloudProcessingEnabler
    DTDFVocab:target ProcessedObjectTracksData
]

instance DataFlowFromTracksToACC : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:source ProcessedObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:target ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DataFlowFromACCToActuation : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:source ACCControlEnabler
    DTDFVocab:target ActuationEnabler
]

instance DataFlowFromActuationToPhysical : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:source ActuationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:target VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DataFlowFromPhysicalToDigital : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:source PhysicalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:target DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:via CommunicationLink
]

instance DataFlowFromDigitalToUser : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:source DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:target UserEntity
    DTDFVocab:via UserDigitalTwinInteraction
]

instance DataFlowFromUserToDigital : DTDFVocab:DataFlow [
    DTDFVocab:source UserEntity
    DTDFVocab:target DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:via UserDigitalTwinInteraction
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual twin to the physical twin include:
   - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the Digital Twin Entity, transmitted via **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** to the **Actuation FE** in the Physical Twin Entity.
   - **Actuation signals** (motor voltage commands and steering adjustments) sent to the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** and **steering servo** to control the PT's speed and direction.
   - **Emergency braking commands** issued via the **Control Panel** in the User Entity, processed by the **Controlling FE** and transmitted to the PT for immediate intervention."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates on a **real-time time-scale**, synchronized with the physical twin at a **100 ms clock accuracy** (due to hardware limitations) to ensure low-latency interactions. Key time-scale specifications include:
   - **End-to-end latency** of **≤100 ms** between the PT and Digital Twin Entity, compliant with **3GPP Technical Specification 22.185** for Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication.
   - **Perception cycle frequency** for object detection and tracking (LiDAR and depth camera data processed at **~10-30 Hz** depending on sensor resolution and computational load).
   - **ACC control loop** executed at **~10 Hz** to maintain real-time responsiveness for speed adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation is orchestrated as a **distributed, entity-based system** with the following components and interactions:
   - **Physical Twin (PT)**: Hosts **sensors (LiDAR, depth camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering servo)**, and **ROS2 nodes** for data acquisition and pre-processing.
   - **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Executes **ACC logic**, **data collection**, **reporting**, and **visualization pre-processing** on a separate hardware (cloud/edge), connected via **Wi-Fi**.
   - **User Entity (UE)**: Provides **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** interfaces for remote monitoring and management, deployed on a **separate UI server**.
   - **Data Flow**:
     1. **PT → DTE**: Sensor data (ROS2 topics) → **Data Translation FE** → **Wi-Fi** → **Digital Twin Entity**.
     2. **DTE → PT**: Control commands (ROS2 topics) → **Actuation FE** → **Wi-Fi** → **Physical Twin Entity**.
     3. **DTE → UE**: Processed data → **Presentation FE** → **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** for user interaction."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system supports **operational and developmental lifecycle stages** of the physical twin, covering:
   - **As-Operated Phase**: Real-time monitoring, remote management, and **predictive maintenance** (e.g., ACC performance optimization, emergency braking).
   - **Design/Validation Phase**: Use of the DT as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for testing ACC algorithms, validating compliance with **ISO 15622** (Performance Class I ACC), and simulating **purposeful experiments** for data-driven improvements.
   - **Lifecycle Integration**: Facilitates **digital threads** for vehicle management by maintaining continuous data flow from design to operation via the DT."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system ensures fidelity and validity through:
   - **Real-Time Synchronization**: **100 ms clock accuracy** and **<100 ms latency** to maintain temporal consistency between PT and DT.
   - **Sensor Calibration**: **LiDAR and depth camera** data validated via **DBSCAN clustering** and **Kalman filtering** for accurate object detection and tracking.
   - **Control Validation**: **ACC logic** validated against **ISO 15622 (Performance Class I)** standards, ensuring compliance with safety-critical requirements.
   - **Data Integrity**: **ROS2** ensures reliable message passing, while **SQL database** storage guarantees historical data consistency for reporting.
   - **Uncertainty Handling**: **Kalman Filter** accounts for sensor noise and environmental variations in object state estimation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs the following technical connections:
   - **Internal Communication**:
     - **ROS2** for intra-entity communication (e.g., **PT Entity** nodes ↔ **DTE** nodes on the same hardware).
     - **Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP)** for inter-entity communication between **PT** and **DTE**, with **<100 ms end-to-end latency**.
   - **Data Protocols**:
     - **ROS2 topics** for sensor data (LiDAR, depth camera) and control commands (motor voltage, steering adjustments).
     - **Data Translation FE** serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions (e.g., **m/s → motor PWM**).
   - **Network Architecture**: **Distributed system** with **PT (Jetson Orin Nano)** and **DTE (cloud/edge)** connected via **Wi-Fi**, adhering to **3GPP 22.185 V2V communication standards**."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is hosted and deployed across:
   - **Physical Twin (PT)**: Deployed on the **1/10-scale autonomous vehicle**, running **ROS2** and **Jetpack 5.0** on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano**.
   - **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Hosted on **cloud/edge servers** (separate from PT) to offload computation, with **ROS2** nodes managing data processing, ACC logic, and reporting.
   - **User Entity (UE)**: Deployed on a **separate UI server** (local/cloud) for **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel**, accessible via **web-based or desktop applications**.
   - **Data Storage**: **SQL database** hosted on the **DTE** or a **dedicated database server** for storing processed data and reports."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates horizontally with:
   - **External Simulators**: Potential integration with **CREO Simulate** (as in Rajesh et al. [25]) for **high-fidelity motor simulations** or **3D CAD tools** (e.g., **SolidWorks, CATIA**) for **design-phase validation**.
   - **Fleet Management Systems**: Cloud-based **fleet coordination** (e.g., **cloud-hosted DTs** for multiple vehicles) for **remote diagnostics** and **over-the-air updates**.
   - **AI/ML Platforms**: Future integration with **AI simulation** (Liu and David [15]) via the **User Entity** for **training AI agents** on simulated data."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy considerations in the system include:
   - **Data Ownership**: Primarily owned by the **vehicle manufacturer/operator**, with **PT sensor data** (e.g., LiDAR, depth camera) considered proprietary.
   - **Privacy Measures**:
     - **Anonymization** of object tracks and vehicle state data for **public-facing visualizations** (e.g., **3D Visualization UI**).
     - **Access Control**: **Role-based authentication** (operators vs. developers) for the **Control Panel UI**, restricting remote management to authorized personnel.
     - **Data Encryption**: **Wi-Fi communication** between PT and DTE secured via **TLS/SSL** or **V2V security protocols** (e.g., **3GPP 33.210** for vehicular networks)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to the following standards:
   - **ISO 23247**: **Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework (Part 2: Reference Architecture)** as the foundational architecture, adapted for automotive use with deviations (e.g., **Physical Twin Entity**, split **User Interface FE**).
   - **ISO 15622**: **Road Vehicles – Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) Systems** for **Performance Class I ACC** compliance.
   - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: Potential future use for **data translation standardization** between entities.
   - **3GPP 22.185**: **Service Requirements for V2V Communication**, defining **<100 ms latency** and **clock synchronization (±100 ms)**.
   - **ROS2**: **Middleware standard** for inter-node communication and hardware abstraction."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system incorporates security and safety measures to mitigate risks:
   - **Safety**:
     - **Real-Time Constraints**: **<100 ms latency** and **100 ms clock accuracy** ensure **deterministic control** for ACC operations.
     - **Emergency Braking**: **Hardware-level intervention** via **Control Panel UI** for immediate PT response.
     - **ISO 15622 Compliance**: **Performance Class I ACC** validated to ensure **safety-critical functionality**.
   - **Security**:
     - **Network Security**: **Wi-Fi communication** secured with **TLS/SSL** or **V2V security protocols** (e.g., **3GPP 33.210**) to prevent **cyber-physical attacks**.
     - **Access Control**: **Role-based authentication** for **remote management** (operators vs. developers) to prevent unauthorized PT actuation.
     - **Data Integrity**: **ROS2** ensures **reliable message passing**, while **SQL database** storage includes **checksums** for data consistency.
   - **Ethical Considerations**: **Human-in-the-Loop (HITL)** design (David and Bork [30]) ensures **operator oversight** for critical decisions, aligning with **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin** taxonomy."
]
